1 Behold, thus saith the Lord, even Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, even he who was crucified for the sins of the world--

1. Behold, thus saith the Lord, even Alpha and Omega, the beginning
 and the end, even he who was crucified for the sins of the world.

Behold, thus saith the Lord, even Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, even he who was crucified for the sins of the world.—Behold, verily I say unto you, my servant. Newel Knight, you shall stand fast in the office wherewith I have ap- pointed you; and if your brethren desire to escape their enemies let them repent of all their sins; and become truly humble before me and contrite: and, as…
